name: Cajun Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz. Frozen whole kernel corn (2 packages)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle or Dutch oven, sauté onion, green pepper, and green onions in oil until tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Add flour and cook until bubbly.
3. Gradually add water, stewed tomatoes, chopped tomatoes, and tomato paste; mix well.
4. Stir in the corn, ham, sausage, cayenne pepper, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
5. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
